zh.Dunstall, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾登斯塔爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Captain Henry Dudley於1517年出生在英國斯塔福爾登斯塔爾時，他的父親Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudley23歲，母親Lady Cecily Grey29歲。他於1545年與Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton在英國波克夏費費爾德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1535年被列為monastic auditor under thomas cromwell。他去世於1553年8月22日在英國英格蘭倫敦享年36歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦。

zh-hans.Dunstall, Staffordshire, England: 英国斯塔福爾登斯塔爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Captain Henry Dudley于1517年出生在英国斯塔福爾登斯塔爾时，他的父亲Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudley23岁，母亲Lady Cecily Grey29岁。他于1545年与Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton在英国波克夏費費爾德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1535年被列为monastic auditor under thomas cromwell。他去世于1553年8月22日在英国英格兰倫敦享年36岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Dudley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (West Midlands): habitational name from Dudley in Worcestershire, recorded as Duddeleye, Doddeleye in the 13th and 14th centuries, named from the Old English personal name Dudda (see Dodd 1) + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

Irish (southern Ireland): in Ireland, when not the English name, it was adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Ó Dubhdáleithe ‘descendant of Dubhdáleithe’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘black’ + dá ‘two’ + léithe ‘sides’.

variants.name: Dowdall
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish John Patrick, Niall.
Irish (Dublin, Meath, and Louth): English surname adopted by bearers of Gaelic Ó Dubhdáleithe (see Dudley 2).

variants.name: Dagley
meanings: English: variant of Dadley, itself a variant of Dudley , with dissimilation of d-d to d-g.
Americanized form of German Dägele (see Dagle ) or Degele, from a short form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names formed with Old High German diot ‘people, nation’.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

variants.name: Diddle
meanings: English: possibly a variant of   Dudley  . Compare   Aduddell  .
In some cases possibly also an Americanized form of German   Dittel  .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Captain Henry Dudley was born in 1517, in Dunstall, Staffordshire, England, his father, Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudley, was 23 and his mother, Lady Cecily Grey, was 29. He married Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton in 1545, in Fyfield, Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. In 1535, at the age of 18, his occupation is listed as monastic auditor under thomas cromwell. He died on 22 August 1553, in London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36, and was buried in London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Captain Henry Dudley est né en 1517, à Dunstall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudley, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Lady Cecily Grey, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton en 1545, à Fyfield, Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. En 1535, à l’âge de 18 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est monastic auditor under thomas cromwell. Il est décédé le 22 août 1553, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Captain Henry Dudley 1517 in Dunstall, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudley 23 und seine Mutter Lady Cecily Grey 29. Er hat 1545 in Fyfield, Berkshire, England Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1535, als er 18 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als monastic auditor under thomas cromwell aufgeführt. Er starb am 22. August 1553 im Alter von 36 Jahren in London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Captain Henry Dudley è nato il nel 1517 nel Dunstall, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudley, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Lady Cecily Grey, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton nel 1545, nel Fyfield, Berkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Nel 1535, all'età di 18 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come monastic auditor under thomas cromwell. Morì il 22 agosto 1553, nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolto a London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Captain Henry Dudleyが1517年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアダンスタルで生まれた時，父Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudleyは23歳，母Lady Cecily Greyは29歳であった。1545年にイギリスバークシュアイアフイフィールドでLady Elizabeth Anne Ashtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。1535年，18歳の時，職業はmonastic auditor under thomas cromwellと記録されている。彼は1553年8月22日にイギリスイギリスロンドンで36歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Captain Henry Dudley(이)가 1517년 영국 스태퍼드실르 던스탤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudley(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Cecily Grey(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1545년 영국 버크실르 피필드에서 Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1535년, 18세의 나이로 그의 직업은 monastic auditor under thomas cromwell이었다. 그는 1553년 8월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Captain Henry Dudley nasceu em 1517, em Dunstall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudley, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Lady Cecily Grey, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton em 1545, em Fyfield, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Em 1535, com 18 anos, sua profissão aparece como monastic auditor under thomas cromwell. Ele faleceu em 22 de agosto de 1553, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 36 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Captain Henry Dudley родился в 1517 г. в местности дунсталл, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudley было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Cecily Grey, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton в 1545 г. в местности фифиелд, биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. В 1535 году, в возрасте 18 лет,  он работал по профессии monastic auditor under thomas cromwell. Он умер 22 августа 1553 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Captain Henry Dudley nació en 1517, en Dunstall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudley, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Lady Cecily Grey, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton en 1545, en Fyfield, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. En 1535, a la edad de 18 años, su ocupación registrada era monastic auditor under thomas cromwell. Murió el 22 de agosto de 1553, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultado en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
